Elon Musk April 2026 Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Trends | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's trending markets as of April 22 heavily feature **Tweet Markets** and **Elon Musk tweet volume predictions**, with the most active being "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" where traders assign 26% odds to the 1160-1199 range and similar probabilities to nearby bins like 1120-1159 (24%).[1][2][3]
